creator: thorolf@grid.einherjar.de
text:
This is the same bug report as 112784, my patch contains only fix for related bug.

Exim's Makefile is missing support for dovecot authenticator.

Fix: 

Apply the patch you will find here:

http://thorkill.einherjar.de/soft/patch/exim-dovecot.diff

Cheers
/rl
